package rulecoverage

func PositiveLogLevelCheckAfterFormat() string {
    ruleID := "log_level_check_after_format"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`zap.S().Debugf(\"expensive %v\", computeDebug())` or `logrus.Debugf(\"data: %v\", expensiveCall())` where the expensive computation happens regardless of log level"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
